name: &RThrone &rof &RSatan&n
description:
&rYou have entered the &RThrone &rof &RSatan&r, The room is light enough to
see, but rather dim.  A huge pentacle is layed out upon the floor, the dwemor

&wof &wCr&Wyst&wal&r, strange runes of gold are set into the throne.  &n
